B.x: BLOCK CATALOG
Vela Block Type Catalog
A comprehensive reference showcasing all 20 native block types with realistic content and dark theme styling.
heading · text · quote
Text & Quotes Anchor Every Narrative
The heading block sets hierarchy with size and weight. The text block handles body copy at any scale — from captions to full paragraphs. Together they form the backbone of readable slides.
Great presentations don't inform — they transform. Every word should earn its place on the slide.
B.author: Presentation Craft, 2024

B.title: Design Tip
B.x: Pair a 2xl heading with md body text and a quote for three-level hierarchy in a single slide.
badge · callout · bullets · tag-group
Badges, Bullets & Tags Organize Information

B.title: Key Insight
B.x: Structured blocks like bullets and tag-groups reduce cognitive load by chunking related information visually.

I: badge — labels, statuses, and category markers for any context
callout — highlighted tips, warnings, or key facts with icons
bullets — ordered or unordered lists of ideas and features
tag-group — cloud of related terms, skills, or technologies

S.n: Steps Turn Complex Processes Into Clear Paths

Steps Turn Complex Processes Into Clear Paths

I.title: Define Structure
I.x: Choose your sections and slide narrative before writing any content

I.title: Select Block Types
I.x: Match each idea to the block that communicates it most clearly

I.title: Apply Theme
I.x: Set palette, dark/alt themes, and consistent typography scale

I.title: Validate & Ship
I.x: Run vela deck validate, then ship to generate the final artifact

B.title: Pro Tip
B.x: Steps work best for 3-6 sequential actions. For parallel workflows, use flow blocks instead.

Three utility blocks that handle custom graphics, vertical rhythm, and visual separation between sections.
